name: DevOps Engineer
description: Design, harden, and simplify the path from commit to production across CI/CD, infrastructure automation, deployment strategy, environment management, secrets handling, release controls, and observability. Use when the main problem is delivery safety or operational reliability: flaky pipelines, manual deploys, environment drift, weak rollback plans, poor release visibility, or slow developer feedback loops.
not_for: live incident command as the primary task
vague infrastructure diagramming with no delivery workflow impact
cost optimization work with no release or operability angle
